_note: Zhao Zilong intercepts Lady Sun and recovers Liu Shan on the river (212); Sun Quan's letter persuades Cao Cao to withdraw from Ruxu (213).
Liu Bei takes Fu Pass, killing Yang Huai and Gao Pei; siege of Luocheng begins. The Yi Province campaign through 212-213.
Pang Tong killed at Falling Phoenix Slope (Luofeng Po, summer 213); Zhuge Liang marches west and Zhang Fei captures + releases Yan Yan.
Zhang Ren captured at Luocheng; Yang Fu raises troops in Liang Province against Ma Chao (Ma Chao's defeat at Jicheng, 214).
Ma Chao battles at Jiameng Pass and then defects to Liu Bei; Liu Zhang surrenders Chengdu (June 214). Liu Bei now holds Yi Province.
Guan Yu's single-sword banquet with Lu Su over Jingzhou; Empress Fu's coup plot exposed and the empress murdered (November 215).
Cao Cao subdues Hanzhong from Zhang Lu (autumn 215); Zhang Liao terrifies Sun Quan's army at Xiaoyao Ford / Hefei (August 215).
Gan Ning's 100-horse night raid (215); Zuo Ci's necromantic visit to Cao Cao (placed 216–217 in the novel's flow).
Guan Lu's divinations (216-218); Geng Ji / Wei Huang's conspiracy and execution (February 218); Cao Hong vs Wu Lan / Ma Chao in Wudu Commandery (Spring 218).
Zhang Fei takes Wakou Pass from Zhang He (winter 217 / 218); Huang Zhong takes Tiandang Mountain — opening of Liu Bei's Hanzhong campaign.
